---
title: "Low level vs high level visual prediction processing"
author: "Max Van Migem"
date: "2025-08-20"
---

```{r packages}
library(car)
library(pbkrtest)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(optimx)
library(performance)
library(emmeans)
# library(brms)
# library(rstan)

```
## load data

```{r data}
df <- read.csv('C:/Users/mvmigem/Documents/data/project_2/compiled_data/behaviour_acc.csv')
# df <- read.csv('C:/Users/mvmigem/Documents/data/project_2/compiled_data/behaviour_rt.csv')

```
```{r data}
df$participant <- as.factor(df$participant)
df$feature <- as.factor(df$feature)
df$attended_feature <- as.factor(df$attended_feature)
df$unattended_feature <- as.factor(df$unattended_feature)


options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

df_angle <- subset(df, feature == 'angle')
df_rotation <- subset(df, feature == 'rotation')
df_att_reg <- subset(df_angle, attended_feature == 'regular')
df_att_odd <- subset(df_angle, attended_feature == 'odd')
df_unat_reg <- subset(df_rotation, unattended_feature == 'regular')
df_unat_odd <- subset(df_rotation, unattended_feature == 'odd')

```

## the behaviour model

# acc
```{r}
# f1 <- dprime ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature + 
#                 feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
#                 (1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature | participant)

f2 <- dprime ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature + 
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + feature|participant) # This one is best after bootstrapping


# f1 <- accuracy ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature + 
#                 feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
#                 (1 + feature + attended_feature +unattended_feature | participant)

f2 <- accuracy ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature + 
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1 | participant) # This one fit better

fit.behaviour_acc <-  lmer(f1, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='optimx', optCtrl=list(method='L-BFGS-B')))
fit.behaviour_acc_2 <-  lmer(f2, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='optimx', optCtrl=list(method='L-BFGS-B')))

confint(fit.behaviour_acc, method ="boot",nsim = 1000)
summary(fit.behaviour_acc_2)
contrasts(df$feature)
contrasts(df$attended_feature)
contrasts(df$unattended_feature)

mean(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)

emmeans(fit.behaviour_acc_2, pairwise ~ unattended_feature | attended_feature)

```
# rt
```{r}

f1 <- rt ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature + 
        feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
        (1 + feature + attended_feature | participant) # dropped unattended_feature out of random eff because convergence

fit.behaviour_rt <-  lmer(f1, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer = c("Nelder_Mead"), optCtrl=list(maxfun=2e6)))

confint(fit.behaviour_rt, method ="Wald")
summary(fit.behaviour_rt)
contrasts(df$feature)
contrasts(df$attended_feature)
contrasts(df$unattended_feature)
emmeans(fit.behaviour_rt, pairwise ~ attended_feature | feature)
emmeans(fit.behaviour_rt, pairwise ~ attended_feature*unattended_feature | feature)

```
```{r}
anova(fit.behaviour_acc,fit.behaviour_acc_2)
summary(fit.behaviour_acc)
summary(fit.behaviour_acc_2)
plot(fit.behaviour_acc_2)
qqnorm(residuals(fit.behaviour_acc_2))
bootstrap|> tidy()
bootstrap <- PBmodcomp(fit.behaviour_acc,fit.behaviour_acc_2,nsim=1000)
check_model(fit.behaviour_acc)
check_model(fit.behaviour_acc_2)

summary(bootstrap)

```
